subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This humble and contrite servant hath turned with his inmost heart toward the Kingdom of Abha [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی ان عبدک هذا المتذلل المنکسر الی ملکوت الابهی قد اقبل بصمیم قلبه الی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @eulogies; reminiscences
